title: funastrum gardneri
intro: Funastrum gardneri, also known as Climbing Milk Prickly Pear, is a type of cactus native to Mexico and Central America that is known for its unique climbing habit and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Funastrum gardneri include its ability to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating skin conditions and wounds. Funastrum gardneri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
